case_title: FAST CASH INC. VS LOPEZ, CRAIG R.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $315.00 FILED BY FAST CASH INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRAIG R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRAIG R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAST CASH INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRAIG R. $315.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $385.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $9.60 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRAIG R.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRAIG R.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRAIG R.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $541.61 AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRAIG R.
